title: Astral Armoury
description: Adds terriria inspired weapons, enchantments, potions and armor!
body:
# Astral Armoury
Dive into the world of Minecraft like never before with this immersive crossover mod!
**This mod is in early alpha! Post your ideas/comments in the discord!**

# Join the Discord!

As this mod is in alpha, **community input is very important to me and will play a huge aspect in the shape of this mod.** [Join the server to provide input, bug reports, get early releases and more.](https://discord.gg/YXDsUKEMMJ)

# Goals
The goal of this mod is to add as many terriria inspired weapons and armour to minecraft as possible, I want minecraft to feel like terraria. That being said, It is very important that my additions do not trump rewards and weapons from other mods, such as mowzies mobs, cataclysm, the aether and such. These mods are meant to live alongside them and provide a much larger armoury of weapons and tools.

The goal of this mod is to add over 300 new weapons and armour.

# Current additions include
* Copper armor and tools (1.20.1-1.21.8)
* Emerald armour and tools
* Spikes, to do damage to mobs
* 3 new tiers of shield
* Cactus armor
* cactus sword
* Lights bane sword
